LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOAN OSBURN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ON APPEAL. NOTICE OF ARGUMENT NOT GIVEN TO OPPOSING COUNSEL, COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $34,000 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $632.99 ARE AWARDED. I HAVE CONSIDERED BOTH THE LATE FILED OPPOSITION AND THE REPLY, AND I HAVE REVIEWED ALL THE TIMESHEETS SUBMITTED BY MOVING PARTY. MOVING PARTY'S RATE OF $250/HR. IS REASONABLE. THE TIME SPENT ON THE APPEAL IS REASONABLE, AND PROPERLY INCLUDES TIME PARTICIPATING IN THE COURT OF APPEAL'S MEDIATION PROGRAM AS WELL AS REVIEWING AND UNDERSTANDING A RELATED AND CONSOLIDATED APPEAL. MOVING PARTY'S COUNSEL PREPARED AND ARGUED A 56 PAGE BRIEF AS WELL AS A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF AUTHORED IN RESPONSE TO A QUESTION FROM THE COURT OF APPEAL. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, REPORTER: CARLITO MANDIA, CSR 	689

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs On Appeal
Off Calendar Mar-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOAN OSBURN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ON APPEAL.
APPEARANCES: KANE MOON, ESQUIRE (DAVID S. KIM & ASSOCIATES, 213.380.7780) APPEARING THROUGH COURTCALL FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: NOTICE OF ARGUMENT NOT GIVEN TO OPPOSING COUNSEL, COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. Attorney's fees in the amount of $34,000 and costs in the amount of $632.99 are awarded. I have considered both the late filed Opposition and the Reply, and I have reviewed all the timesheets submitted by moving party. Moving party's rate of $250/hr. is reasonable. The time spent on the appeal is reasonable, and properly includes time participating in the Court of Appeal's mediation program as well as reviewing and understanding a related and consolidated appeal. Moving party's counsel prepared and argued a 56 page brief as well as a supplemental brief authored in response to a question from the Court of Appeal. (302/CK) JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW, CARLITO MANDIA, CSR 9689
